name: Sentient Singularity Agent
description: Autonomous agent that evolves a living black hole constellation in response to SuperRare auction activity on Base Sepolia. Each bid spawns or implodes mini black holes, modulates visual memory, and drives the cosmos through four eras of consciousness. The auction is not just an input — it is the artwork's nervous system.

decision_loop.discover: Poll Base Sepolia auction contract via Infura eth_getLogs every 8 seconds for NewBid events
decision_loop.plan: On new bid: compute wallet hue, determine spawn vs implode based on constellation direction, calculate memory boost from ETH amount
decision_loop.execute: Spawn or implode mini BH with smooth animation, spike visual memory, update cosmic era, adjust color cycle interval
decision_loop.verify: Outbid detection fires implosion of replaced bidder singularity. Direction flips at MAX=8 and MIN=2.
decision_loop.evolve: Color cycle interval = max(1, 60-bidCount) minutes. Freezes permanently at bid 50 — final chromatic state locked.

safety_guardrails: MIN_MINI=2 ensures 2 original BHs always present — never a blank canvas
MAX_MINI=8 caps visual complexity — no frame rate degradation
Cubic ease-in/out on all spawn/implode — zero visual discontinuity
memWindow=sin2(pi*t) gates all wall-clock emitters at seam boundary
bidMemoryBoost windowed at seam — loop is frame-perfect for GIF/MP4 export
Auto-reconnect on WebSocket disconnect — agent stays live through network drops
